text:
On Sun, Feb 25, 2001 at 10:13:15AM -0800, dim@express.net.ua wrote:

> >Description:
> My central router crashes every day, sometimes it is several times per day.
> Hwen it crashes it writes something like "Memory page write error"

Can you send us the exact text of the error? It isn't "page fault
in kernel mode" is it?

	David.
